{{Quote|Only on the battlefield can you truly learn of someone.|Bralor|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Bralor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Field Marshal/Legends|Field Marshal]] and the champion of the [[Battle Circle]] at the Mandalorian base on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]] following the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Bralor is one of the mightiest among us. He could teach you humility.|[[Davrel]], to [[Meetra Surik]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />}}
Although Bralor was an excellent fighter and champion of the [[Battle Circle]], he was defeated in a duel with [[Meetra Surik]]. However, he considered this an honor, having seen the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] prowess during the [[Mandalorian Wars]], especially their victory at the [[Battle of Malachor V]]. At the battle, he had boarded a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] and personally dueled a Jedi and although he lost, he was spared for his courage. He was a senior [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
